title: NetworkManager bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.52.0-7.0.1]
- disable MPTCP handling by default [Orabug: 34801142]
- add connectivity check via Oracle servers [Orabug: 32051972]
- Add a dropin file to make Networkmanager-dispatcher persistent [Orabug: 36989910]
- Drop 777 permissions from the NetworkManager-dispatcher drop-in directory [Orabug: 37581907]

[1:1.52.0-7]
- ovs: only keep bridges and ports with NM interfaces attached #2 (RHEL-87167)

[1:1.52.0-6]
- ovs: only keep bridges and ports with NM interfaces attached (RHEL-87167)
- device: update the external-down unmanaged flag on port attach/release (RHEL-93183)
- ovs: set the tun interface up before stage3 (RHEL-98550)
- bridge: fix reapplying port VLANs (RHEL-102742)
- device: don't disable IPv6 in stage3 on reapply (RHEL-102771)
full_text:
[1.52.0-7.0.1]
- disable MPTCP handling by default [Orabug: 34801142]
- add connectivity check via Oracle servers [Orabug: 32051972]
- Add a dropin file to make Networkmanager-dispatcher persistent [Orabug: 36989910]
- Drop 777 permissions from the NetworkManager-dispatcher drop-in directory [Orabug: 37581907]

[1:1.52.0-7]
- ovs: only keep bridges and ports with NM interfaces attached #2 (RHEL-87167)

[1:1.52.0-6]
- ovs: only keep bridges and ports with NM interfaces attached (RHEL-87167)
- device: update the external-down unmanaged flag on port attach/release (RHEL-93183)
- ovs: set the tun interface up before stage3 (RHEL-98550)
- bridge: fix reapplying port VLANs (RHEL-102742)
- device: don't disable IPv6 in stage3 on reapply (RHEL-102771)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-15879.html
